rationale: The proposed change to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount has no relationship to Educ. Code §29.922, which establishes the Texas Workforce Innovation Needs Program for school districts and higher education institutions.
quote: Sec. 29.922. TEXAS WORKFORCE INNOVATION NEEDS PROGRAM.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and this education workforce innovation program statute.
